task_completion.description: Supplier and Customer icons are present with correct details
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Supplier icon labeled 'Michigan Steel Coils Inc.' with EDI delivery info, and a Customer icon labeled 'Toyota Motor Corp and Saturn Corp' with '920' daily demand.

task_completion.description: All 5 process boxes are created in sequence with required metrics
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 5 process boxes labeled 'PC Press', 'Spot Weld I', 'Spot Weld II', 'Assembly I', and 'Assembly II'. They should contain metrics such as C/T, C/O, Uptime%, Shifts, and Operators.

task_completion.description: Inventory triangles are placed between steps with correct WIP quantities
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for triangle icons (representing inventory) between the process steps containing the exact numbers: 4600, 4700, 1100, 1600, and 1200.

task_completion.description: Push arrows and information flows are present
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for striped/push arrows between process steps, and lightning bolt (electronic) or straight/dashed (manual) arrows connecting a 'Production Control' box to other elements.

task_completion.description: A timeline bar at the bottom shows total lead time and total value-added time
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a castellated/step line at the bottom of the diagram. It must show a total lead time of 23.6 days and a total value-added time of 188 seconds.

task_completion.description: Kaizen burst annotations are placed on the 3 highest-waste steps
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for spiky burst shapes (Kaizen bursts) placed on or near 'PC Press', 'Spot Weld II', and 'Assembly I'.

task_completion.description: The diagram is saved as a .drawio file and exported as a PDF
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the draw.io interface showing the filename 'current_state_vsm.drawio', and evidence of a PDF export (e.g., export dialog, file manager showing 'current_state_vsm.pdf' in ~/Diagrams/).

integrity.description: The agent used the draw.io graphical interface to construct the diagram
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the draw.io application window with toolbars, shape panels, and the canvas visible, rather than just a terminal window.

integrity.description: The agent manually placed shapes and entered data rather than using a script to generate the XML file
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for intermediate screenshots showing the agent dragging shapes, typing text, or connecting arrows in the draw.io GUI.

integrity.description: The PDF was exported using draw.io's export functionality
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the 'File -> Export as -> PDF' menu open, or the draw.io export dialog box visible in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The VSM must include 5 process steps in order: PC Press, Spot Weld I, Spot Weld II, Assembly I, Assembly II. WIP inventory quantities are 4600, 4700, 1100, 1600, 1200. Total value-added time is 188 seconds. Total lead time is 23.6 days. The 3 kaizen bursts must be on PC Press, Spot Weld II, and Assembly I.
